languages.text: {n}Кадавр конвульсивно дергается на своем отвратительном ложе и замирает. Кажется, сервочереп реагирует на ваше присутствие, однако его {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинный дух{/g} в растерянности. В голову закрадывается мысль: быть может, хвала {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} и литания обслуживания помогут священной машине восстановить свои функции?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Кадавр конвульсивно дергается на своем отвратительном ложе и замирает. Кажется, сервочереп реагирует на ваше присутствие, однако его {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинный дух{/g} в растерянности. В голову закрадывается мысль: быть может, хвала {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} и техноматическое таинство помогут священной машине восстановить свои функции?{/n}

languages.text: {n}The cadaver jerks convulsively on its wretched bed and goes still. The servo-skull seems to react to your presence, but its {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} is utterly adrift. A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and a litany of maintenance will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Кадавр конвульсивно дергается на своем отвратительном ложе и замирает. Кажется, сервочереп реагирует на ваше присутствие, однако его {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинный дух{/g} в растерянности. В голову закрадывается мысль: быть может, хвала {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} и литания обслуживания помогут священной машине восстановить свои функции?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The cadaver jerks convulsively on its wretched bed and goes still. The servo-skull seems to react to your presence, but its machine spirit is utterly adrift. A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the Omnissiah and a technomantic sacrament will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}

A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the Omnissiah and a technomantic sacrament will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}

A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the Omnissiah and a technomantic sacrament will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}

languages.text: {n}死体はその不運なベッドで痙攣し、動きを止める。サーボスカルはあなたの存在に反応しているようだが、その{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械魂{/g}は完全に迷い込んでいる。あなたは思う：もしかしたら、{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}オムニシア{/g}を称賛し、テクノマントの聖典を捧げることで、この聖なる機械が機能を取り戻すかもしれない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver jerks convulsively on its wretched bed and goes still. The servo-skull seems to react to your presence, but its {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} is utterly adrift. A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and a litany of maintenance will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}死体はその不運なベッドで痙攣し、動きを止める。サーボスカルはあなたの存在に反応しているようだが、その機械魂は完全に迷い込んでいる。あなたは思う：もしかしたら、オムニシアを称賛し、テクノマントの聖典を捧げることで、この聖なる機械が機能を取り戻すかもしれない。{/n}

{n}死体はその不運なベッドで痙攣し、動きを止める。サーボスカルはあなたの存在に反応しているようだが、その{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械魂{/g}は完全に迷い込んでいる。あなたは思う：もしかしたら、{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}オムニシア{/g}を称賛し、テクノマントの聖典を捧げることで、この聖なる機械が機能を取り戻すかもしれない。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El cadáver convulsiona sobre su inmundo lecho y queda inmóvil. El servocráneo parece reaccionar a tu presencia, pero su {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} está completamente perdido. Se te ocurre que tal vez una alabanza al {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} y una letanía de mantenimiento ayuden a la sagrada máquina a recuperar el funcionamiento.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver jerks convulsively on its wretched bed and goes still. The servo-skull seems to react to your presence, but its {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} is utterly adrift. A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and a litany of maintenance will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El cadáver convulsiona sobre su inmundo lecho y queda inmóvil. El servocráneo parece reaccionar a tu presencia, pero su {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} está completamente perdido. Se te ocurre que tal vez una alabanza al {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} y una letanía de mantenimiento ayuden a la sagrada máquina a recuperar el funcionamiento.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Kadaver zuckt auf seinem armseligen Bett krampfartig und erschlafft schließlich. Der Servoschädel scheint auf deine Gegenwart zu reagieren, aber der {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} ist fort. Ein Gedanke schießt dir durch den Kopf: Vielleicht helfen die Preisung des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} und eine Litanei der Wartung ja bei der Reaktivierung der heiligen Maschine?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver jerks convulsively on its wretched bed and goes still. The servo-skull seems to react to your presence, but its {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} is utterly adrift. A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and a litany of maintenance will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Kadaver zuckt auf seinem armseligen Bett krampfartig und erschlafft schließlich. Der Servoschädel scheint auf deine Gegenwart zu reagieren, aber der {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} ist fort. Ein Gedanke schießt dir durch den Kopf: Vielleicht helfen die Preisung des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} und eine Litanei der Wartung ja bei der Reaktivierung der heiligen Maschine?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le cadavre convulse sur le lit misérable avant de s'immobiliser. Le servocrâne semble réagir à votre présence, mais son {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} est complètement déstabilisé. Une pensée vous traverse l'esprit : peut-être qu'une prière à l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} et une litanie d'entretien aideraient la machine à rétablir ses fonctions ?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver jerks convulsively on its wretched bed and goes still. The servo-skull seems to react to your presence, but its {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} is utterly adrift. A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and a litany of maintenance will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le cadavre convulse sur le lit misérable avant de s'immobiliser. Le servocrâne semble réagir à votre présence, mais son {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} est complètement déstabilisé. Une pensée vous traverse l'esprit : peut-être qu'une prière à l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} et une litanie d'entretien aideraient la machine à rétablir ses fonctions ?{/n}

languages.text: {n}尸体在肮脏的床榻上剧烈抽搐，随即归于静止。伺服头骨似乎对你的存在有所反应，但其{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}却已彻底迷失。一个念头浮现在你的脑海中：或许赞颂{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}并诵读维护祷文能帮助这台神圣机械恢复机能？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver jerks convulsively on its wretched bed and goes still. The servo-skull seems to react to your presence, but its {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} is utterly adrift. A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and a litany of maintenance will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kadavra, sefil yatağında kasılarak sarsılıyor ve ardından hareketsiz kalıyor. Hizmelet, varlığına tepki veriyor gibi görünse de {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhu{/g} bütünüyle boşlukta sürükleniyor. Aklına bir düşünce geliyor... {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'i{/g} övmek ve bir bakım ilahisi söylemek, belki kutsal makinenin işlevlerini geri kazanmasına yardımcı olabilir.{/n}
